title: Non-spherical BUFFALOs: a weak lensing view of the Frontier Field clusters and associated systematics
summary: Galaxy clusters are tracers of the large scale structures of the Universe, making the time evolution of their mass function dependent on key cosmological parameters, such as the cosmic matter density or the amplitude of density fluctuations $σ_8$. Accurate measurements of cluster's total masses are therefore essential, yet they can be challenging, particularly for clusters with complex morphologies, as simple mass profiles are often adopted to fit the measurements. In this work, we focus on the Frontier Fields galaxy clusters: a sample of six extremely massive systems, that, in most cases, exhibit highly complex mass distributions. The BUFFALO survey extended the Hubble Space Telescope observations for the Frontier Fields galaxy clusters, providing high-resolution multi-band imaging within a few Mpc. Combining this high-quality imaging dataset with ancillary spectroscopy, we produce weak-lensing catalogues with very high source densities, about 50 sources/arcmin$^2$. This allows us to robustly estimate the individual weak-lensing cluster masses and quantify the sensitivity of these measurements on different factors, such as the cluster centring, the uncertainty on the redshift distribution or the foreground contamination and boost factor correction. This provides a data-driven analysis of the different sources of systematics that can impact such measurements. We find that the largest sources of systematic bias arise for the most disturbed clusters, such as the multi-modal, merging galaxy cluster Abell 2744. This analysis sets a comprehensive framework for assessing the impact of systematics on the weak-lensing estimates of cluster masses, and in particular, in the case of unrelaxed clusters. This can play a key role in forthcoming cosmological analyses based on wide-field surveys such as Euclid and the Legacy Survey of Space and Time of the Rubin Observatory.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用BUFFALO巡天数据对Frontier Fields星系团进行弱引力透镜质量测量，系统分析了各种系统误差来源，特别关注形态复杂星系团的质量估计准确性。
AI.motivation: 星系团质量函数的时间演化依赖于关键宇宙学参数，但复杂形态星系团的质量测量存在挑战。Frontier Fields星系团样本包含六个极端大质量系统，多数具有高度复杂的质量分布，为研究系统误差提供了理想案例。
AI.method: 结合BUFFALO巡天的高分辨率多波段哈勃空间望远镜观测数据和辅助光谱数据，构建了约50个源/平方角分的极高密度弱引力透镜源目录。系统评估了不同因素对质量测量的影响，包括星系团中心定位、红移分布不确定性、前景污染和增强因子校正等。
AI.result: 研究发现最大的系统误差来源出现在最扰动的星系团中，如多模态合并星系团Abell 2744。该分析为评估弱引力透镜质量估计中的系统误差影响建立了全面框架。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究为未来基于宽视场巡天（如Euclid和Rubin天文台LSST）的宇宙学分析提供了关键参考，特别是在处理未弛豫星系团质量测量时，系统误差评估框架将发挥重要作用。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究星系团的弱引力透镜质量测量和系统误差，属于星系团尺度弱透镜宇宙学。用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系动力学和多相气体。虽然论文涉及引力透镜，但属于弱透镜且聚焦于星系团，与用户强透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣方向重叠有限。作者中仅A. M. Koekemoer在用户核心作者列表中，但权重不高。因此相关性较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 弱透镜星系团质量测量与用户强透镜、高红移星系动力学核心兴趣方向匹配度低。
recommendation.method_fit: 弱透镜剪切测量方法与用户常用的强透镜建模、高分辨率光谱/干涉成像方法不同。
recommendation.author_fit: 仅一位作者（A. M. Koekemoer）在用户核心作者列表中，且权重不高。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 系统误差分析框架有一定参考价值，但非用户核心关注点。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题为弱透镜星系团宇宙学，与用户强透镜、高红移星系动力学核心兴趣方向不符。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团是宇宙大尺度结构的示踪物，其质量函数的时间演化依赖于关键宇宙学参数，例如宇宙物质密度或密度涨落幅度 $σ_8$。因此，精确测量星系团的总质量至关重要，但对于具有复杂形态的星系团，由于常采用简单的质量分布模型来拟合测量结果，这一任务可能充满挑战。本研究聚焦于前沿场星系团：一个包含六个极端大质量系统的样本，这些系统在大多数情况下展现出高度复杂的质量分布。BUFFALO巡天扩展了哈勃空间望远镜对前沿场星系团的观测，在数兆秒差距范围内提供了高分辨率多波段成像。结合这一高质量成像数据集与辅助光谱学，我们生成了具有极高源密度的弱引力透镜目录，约为50个源/平方角分。这使我们能够稳健地估算单个弱引力透镜星系团质量，并量化这些测量对不同因素的敏感性，例如星系团定心、红移分布的不确定性、前景污染及增亮因子修正。这提供了一种数据驱动的分析，以评估可能影响此类测量的不同系统误差来源。我们发现，最大的系统偏差来源出现在最受扰动的星系团中，例如多模态、并合的星系团Abell 2744。本分析建立了一个综合框架，用于评估系统误差对弱引力透镜星系团质量估算的影响，特别是在未弛豫星系团的情况下。这将在未来基于宽视场巡天（如Euclid和鲁宾天文台时空遗产巡天）的宇宙学分析中发挥关键作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，本研究的结论是：该分析为未来基于宽视场巡天（如Euclid和鲁宾天文台LSST）的宇宙学分析提供了关键参考，特别是在处理未弛豫星系团质量测量时，系统误差评估框架将发挥重要作用。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: The BUFFALO/Frontier Fields clusters, with X-ray surface brightness peak positions, and redshifts.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：BUFFALO/前沿场星系团，包含X射线表面亮度峰值位置和红移。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: BUFFALO observations in the ACS/F814W band for the six galaxy clusters (which also incorporates the data taken within the HFF and other ancillary programmes). The fiducial cluster centres, corresponding to the X-ray surface-brightness peaks, are shown as black crosses, while the circles have a radius of 1 comoving Mpc. The mosaic pattern of the BUFFALO observations can be seen on the image, with the two adjacent fields for each cluster, the main and the parallel, each \(\sim 5\penalty 10000\ arcmin^{2}\) . Note the small gap in the mosaic between the two fields.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：六个星系团在ACS/F814W波段的BUFFALO观测（也包含了HFF及其他辅助项目获取的数据）。基准星系团中心（对应X射线表面亮度峰值）以黑色十字标记，圆圈半径为1共动兆秒差距。图像上可见BUFFALO观测的镶嵌模式，每个星系团有两个相邻视场（主视场和平行视场），每个视场约 \(\sim 5\penalty 10000\ arcmin^{2}\)。注意两个视场之间镶嵌图中的小间隙。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Summary of the X-ray observations used in this work with the combined exposure time among all observations and the associated ID. Besides A370 where we use XMM-Newton observations, all the others are from the Chandra X-ray Observatory .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：本工作所用X射线观测的总结，包括所有观测的组合曝光时间及相关ID。除A370使用XMM-牛顿望远镜观测外，其余均来自钱德拉X射线天文台。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Background galaxy selections for the cluster AS1063. Top: Colour-colour diagram ( \(m_{{F814W}}\) - \(m_{{F160W}}\) ) vs ( \(m_{{F606W}}\) - \(m_{{F160W}}\) ) for objects with good WFC3/F160W, ACS/F814W and ACS/F606W photometry. Grey dots represent all galaxies with both ACS and WFC3 imaging. Non-lensed galaxies, diluting the shear signal, are marked by different colours: galaxies identified as foreground with spectroscopic redshifts \(z Bottom: Colour-magnitude diagram \(m_{{F814W}}\) vs ( \(m_{{F606W}}-m_{{F814W}}\) ) for galaxies within the ACS field without WFC3 imaging. The same colour code as above is applied. The bright source cut is shown as a dashed horizontal line.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：星系团AS1063的背景星系选择。上图：对于具有良好WFC3/F160W、ACS/F814W和ACS/F606W测光的天体，其颜色-颜色图（ \(m_{{F814W}}\) - \(m_{{F160W}}\) ） vs （ \(m_{{F606W}}\) - \(m_{{F160W}}\) ）。灰色点代表所有同时具有ACS和WFC3成像的星系。非透镜星系（会稀释切变信号）以不同颜色标记：通过光谱红移 \(z Bottom: 对于ACS视场内无WFC3成像的星系，其颜色-星等图 \(m_{{F814W}}\) vs （ \(m_{{F606W}}-m_{{F814W}}\) ）。颜色编码与上图相同。亮源截断以水平虚线表示。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Weak lensing source statistics for the six lens cluster fields, from left to right: name of the cluster, number of sources in the catalogue after the cleaning cuts; number of sources with a spectroscopic redshift; number of sources without a spectroscopic redshift but with a photometric redshift; number of sources without a spectroscopic redshift measurement but with magnitudes measured in either 3, 2 or 1 photometric bands; final number of background galaxies in the catalogue, source density in arcmin -2 , mean weighted redshift of the sample, and effective, unmasked area in arcmin 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：六个透镜星系团视场的弱引力透镜源统计，从左到右：星系团名称、清洗截断后目录中的源数量、具有光谱红移的源数量、无光谱红移但有测光红移的源数量、无光谱红移测量但具有3、2或1个测光波段星等测量的源数量、目录中最终背景星系数量、源密度（每平方角分）、样本的平均加权红移以及有效未掩蔽面积（平方角分）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Redshift distribution function \(N(z)\) for the background galaxy population. Top panel: redshift distribution for the background source distribution for each cluster, estimated from galaxies with either a measured spectroscopic or photometric redshift. Dashed vertical lines represent the weighted mean of the redshift distribution for each cluster. Bottom panel: the black histogram represents the \(N(z)\) for all six galaxy clusters combined, where error bars show the standard deviation between clusters. The blue curve represents the fit of a Smail & Dickinson ( 1995 ) distribution to the histogram, and the orange curve of a log-normal distribution. In both cases, the best-fit parameters are given in the legend between brackets. The dashed green curve represents the Smail & Dickinson ( 1995 ) distribution with the original parameters, also given in brackets. We note the small but statistically significant peak at \(z\sim 4.3\) , which could be due to a systematic bias in the photometric-redshift estimation, but would require further investigations.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：背景星系群的红移分布函数 \(N(z)\) 。上图：每个星系团背景源分布的红移分布，基于具有光谱或测光红移测量的星系估算。垂直虚线代表每个星系团红移分布的加权平均值。下图：黑色直方图代表所有六个星系团合并后的 \(N(z)\) ，误差棒显示星系团间的标准差。蓝色曲线表示Smail & Dickinson (1995)分布对直方图的拟合，橙色曲线表示对数正态分布拟合。两种情况下，最佳拟合参数均显示在图例括号中。绿色虚线表示具有原始参数的Smail & Dickinson (1995)分布，参数也显示在括号中。我们注意到在 \(z\sim 4.3\) 处有一个小但统计显著的峰值，这可能是测光红移估算中的系统偏差所致，但需要进一步研究。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Top panel: in black, \(\Delta\Sigma_{r}\) profiles for each of the six galaxy clusters. The error bars account for the uncertainty coming from the missing redshift information for a fraction of the sources, as well as the statistical errors. Only bins where the number of background sources is higher than a given threshold are used to fit the model (solid line). For each cluster, we represent the best-fit NFW model with the \al@darragh-ford2023 \(M-c\) relation as a solid orange line, and 1000 models corresponding to randomly drawn MCMC samples to show the dispersion. In addition, for A370 and AS1063 the “Flat \(c\) prior” best-fit models are shown with blue dashed lines. Finally, the green dot-dashed lines correspond to the Singular Isothermal Sphere (SIS) models described in Sect. 5.8 . Bottom panel: number of background sources used to compute the lensing signal in each radial bin. The y-axis is in linear scale.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：上图：黑色线为六个星系团各自的 \(\Delta\Sigma_{r}\) 轮廓。误差棒考虑了部分源缺失红移信息带来的不确定性以及统计误差。仅使用背景源数量高于给定阈值的径向区间来拟合模型（实线）。对于每个星系团，我们以橙色实线表示使用\al@darragh-ford2023 \(M-c\) 关系的最佳拟合NFW模型，并显示1000个对应随机抽取MCMC样本的模型以展示离散度。此外，对于A370和AS1063，以蓝色虚线显示“平坦 \(c\) 先验”最佳拟合模型。最后，绿色点划线对应第5.8节描述的奇异等温球（SIS）模型。下图：每个径向区间内用于计算透镜信号的背景源数量。y轴为线性刻度。

figures.caption_en: Table 4: Best-fit parameters for the six BUFFALO galaxy clusters. The masses, \(M_{200}\) , are expressed as \(\log M_{200}/M_{\odot}\) . We present different fitting approaches: (1) the two free parameters \(M_{200}\) and \(c\) are sampled, starting with flat priors for both of them (“Flat \(c\) prior”), and (2) a concentration-mass relation is used, leaving only one free parameter, \(M_{200}\) . We test the mass-concentration relations from \al@darragh-ford2023 (their fit to the strong+weak lensing data for the CLASH clusters), and from Duffy et al. ( 2008 ) (full sample, for NFW haloes with \(\Delta\) =200). For the “Flat \(c\) prior” case, clusters for which the concentration value did not converge well are shown in light grey. The last columns corresponds to the model fitted to the combination of strong and weak lensing measurements, using either the X-ray peak as centre (Xcen), or one of the BCGs (C0).
figures.caption_zh: 表4：六个BUFFALO星系团的最佳拟合参数。质量 \(M_{200}\) 以 \(\log M_{200}/M_{\odot}\) 表示。我们展示了不同的拟合方法：(1) 对两个自由参数 \(M_{200}\) 和 \(c\) 进行采样，两者均从平坦先验开始（“平坦 \(c\) 先验”），以及 (2) 使用浓度-质量关系，仅保留一个自由参数 \(M_{200}\) 。我们测试了来自\al@darragh-ford2023（其对CLASH星系团强+弱透镜数据的拟合）和Duffy et al. (2008)（完整样本，针对 \(\Delta\) =200的NFW晕）的质量-浓度关系。对于“平坦 \(c\) 先验”情况，浓度值未良好收敛的星系团以浅灰色显示。最后一列对应拟合强透镜和弱透镜测量组合的模型，使用X射线峰值作为中心（Xcen）或其中一个BCG（C0）。

title: The Massive and Distant Clusters of WISE Survey 2: Splashback Radii to z=1.65 from Galaxy Density Profiles
comment: 22 pages, 7 figures, 9 tables, submitted to ApJ
summary: The Massive and Distant Clusters of WISE Survey 2 (MaDCoWS2) is a WISE-selected catalog of galaxy clusters at $0.1<z<2$ covering an effective area of $>6000$ deg$^2$. In this paper, we derive splashback radii for this cluster ensemble from galaxy density profiles and constrain the mass threshold of the survey as a function of redshift. We use MaDCoWS2 cluster candidates at $0.4\leq z \leq 1.65$ divided into subsamples with different signal-to-noise (S/N$_{\rm P}$) and redshifts, cross-correlated with galaxies from the CatWISE2020 catalog, to obtain average surface density profiles. We perform a Markov Chain Monte Carlo analysis to derive parameter estimates for theoretical models consisting of orbiting and infalling terms. A distinct splashback feature is detected in all subsamples. The measured splashback radii span from $0.89^{+0.02}_{-0.02}h^{-1}$ comoving Mpc/cMpc ($0.61^{+0.02}_{-0.02}h^{-1}$ proper Mpc/pMpc) at $\overline{z}=0.45$ to $1.27^{+0.05}_{-0.05}h^{-1}$ cMpc ($0.53^{+0.04}_{-0.04}h^{-1}$ pMpc) at $\overline{z}=1.54$. We also find that splashback radii increase with $S/N_{\rm P}$ at fixed redshift. The resultant splashback radii constrain the redshift dependence of the mass of MaDCoWS2 clusters at fixed $S/N_{\rm P}$. We calculate $M_{\rm 200m}$ from the radii using a relation based on a cosmological simulation. MaDCoWS2 $M_{\rm 200m}$ values derived from the simulation-based relation are lower than the expected values based on weak-lensing observations. More robust mass constraints will come from calibrating splashback radii derived from galaxy density profiles with weak lensing shear profiles from facilities such as $\textit{Euclid}$, Rubin, and $\textit{Roman}$.

AI.tldr: MaDCoWS2巡天通过星系密度剖面测量星系团溅落半径，约束了巡天的质量阈值随红移的变化，发现溅落半径随红移和信噪比增加而增大。
AI.motivation: 研究星系团溅落半径随红移和信噪比的变化，利用溅落半径约束MaDCoWS2巡天中星系团的质量阈值，并与弱引力透镜观测结果进行比较。
AI.method: 使用MaDCoWS2星系团候选体（0.4≤z≤1.65），按信噪比和红移分为子样本，与CatWISE2020星系目录交叉相关获得平均表面密度剖面，通过马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛分析拟合轨道和下落成分的理论模型。
AI.result: 在所有子样本中都检测到明显的溅落特征，溅落半径从z=0.45时的0.89±0.02 h⁻¹ cMpc到z=1.54时的1.27±0.05 h⁻¹ cMpc，且固定红移下溅落半径随信噪比增加而增大。基于模拟关系计算的M200m质量低于弱透镜观测预期值。
AI.conclusion: 溅落半径测量为MaDCoWS2巡天的质量阈值提供了约束，未来需要通过与欧几里得、鲁宾、罗曼等望远镜的弱透镜剪切剖面校准来获得更可靠的质量约束。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究星系团的溅落半径和巡天质量阈值，属于星系团宇宙学范畴。虽然涉及引力透镜（弱透镜）作为未来校准手段，但论文核心并非用户主要关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移多相气体等主题。用户画像中强相关关键词（如lens, lensing）权重较高，但论文本身并非强透镜研究，且无核心作者匹配，因此相关性较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为星系团溅落半径和巡天质量，与用户主要关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移多相气体等主题仅有弱关联（通过弱透镜提及）。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。方法基于星系密度剖面和MCMC拟合，与用户常用的强透镜建模、高分辨率光谱或ALMA成像等方法不匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者均不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文创新点在于溅落半径的巡天级测量，但未涉及用户感兴趣的高红移星系内部物理或强透镜技术。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于星系团宇宙学，偏离用户主要研究领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 大规模和遥远WISE巡天2（MaDCoWS2）是一个基于WISE选择的星系团星表，覆盖红移范围$0.1<z<2$，有效面积超过$6000$ deg$^2$。本文通过星系密度剖面推导了该星系团集合的溅射半径，并约束了巡天质量阈值随红移的变化。我们将MaDCoWS2候选星系团按$0.4\leq z \leq 1.65$分为不同信噪比（S/N$_{\rm P}$）和红移的子样本，与CatWISE2020星表中的星系进行交叉关联，获得平均表面密度剖面。我们采用马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛分析，对包含轨道和下落项的理论模型进行参数估计。所有子样本均检测到明显的溅射特征。测得的溅射半径从$\overline{z}=0.45$时的$0.89^{+0.02}_{-0.02}h^{-1}$共动Mpc/cMpc（$0.61^{+0.02}_{-0.02}h^{-1}$本征Mpc/pMpc）变化到$\overline{z}=1.54$时的$1.27^{+0.05}_{-0.05}h^{-1}$ cMpc（$0.53^{+0.04}_{-0.04}h^{-1}$ pMpc）。我们还发现，在固定红移下，溅射半径随S/N$_{\rm P}$增加而增大。由此得到的溅射半径约束了固定S/N$_{\rm P}$下MaDCoWS2星系团质量的红移依赖性。我们基于宇宙学模拟的关系从半径计算$M_{\rm 200m}$。基于模拟关系得到的MaDCoWS2 $M_{\rm 200m}$值低于基于弱透镜观测的预期值。更可靠的质量约束将来自通过$\textit{Euclid}$、Rubin和$\textit{Roman}$等设施的弱透镜剪切剖面校准由星系密度剖面导出的溅射半径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，溅落半径测量为MaDCoWS2巡天的质量阈值提供了约束，未来需要通过与欧几里得、鲁宾、罗曼等望远镜的弱透镜剪切剖面校准来获得更可靠的质量约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sample selection of the cluster candidates used in the analysis of this paper. The cluster sample is displayed in hexagonal bins with a bin size of \(0.05\) in cluster redshift on the x-axis and \(0.5\) in S/N P on the y-axis. S/N P and \(z\) are the signal-to-noise ratio and photometric redshift of the clusters. Bin colors indicate the number of clusters. The solid red lines display the binning scheme for subsamples shown in Table 1 . The red squares indicate \(\overline{\text{S/N}}_{P}\) and \(\overline{z}\) of the subsamples.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本文分析中使用的候选星系团样本选择。星系团样本以六边形箱显示，x轴箱大小为\(0.05\)（星系团红移），y轴箱大小为\(0.5\)（S/N P）。S/N P和\(z\)分别为星系团的信噪比和测光红移。箱颜色表示星系团数量。红色实线显示表1中子样本的分箱方案。红色方块表示子样本的\(\overline{\text{S/N}}_{P}\)和\(\overline{z}\)。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Cluster counts in each bin, organized by redshift (first column) and S/N P (three other columns.)
figures.caption_zh: 表1：每个箱中的星系团计数，按红移（第一列）和S/N P（其他三列）组织。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Prior range for each model parameter in § III.2
figures.caption_zh: 表2：§ III.2中每个模型参数的先验范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Galaxy surface density versus comoving projected radius (left column), galaxy density versus comoving three-dimensional radius (middle column), and logarithmic derivative of galaxy density versus comoving three-dimensional radius (right column) of MaDCoWS2 clusters with \(5\leq\) S/N P \( 1 . The surface density measurements as described in § III.1 are shown as data points in the left column. The solid lines in the left column are the best fit to galaxy surface density from the model fitting scheme in § III.3 . The solid lines in the right column show the three-dimensional splashback radii ( \(r_{sp}\) ). For reference, dashed lines show the profiles and splashback radius of the lowest redshift bin in the higher redshift subsamples. We input all fit parameters in our MCMC samples to the model in § III.2 and generate the curves in the middle columns. The curves in the right column correspond to the best-fit parameters, and to the 0th and 100th percentiles of the parameter distribution.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：MaDCoWS2星系团的星系表面密度与共动投影半径（左列）、星系密度与共动三维半径（中列）以及星系密度对数导数与共动三维半径（右列），其中\(5\leq\) S/N P \( 1 。左列数据点显示§ III.1中描述的表面密度测量值。左列实线为§ III.3模型拟合方案对星系表面密度的最佳拟合。右列实线显示三维溅射半径（\(r_{sp}\)）。作为参考，虚线显示较高红移子样本中最低红移箱的剖面和溅射半径。我们将所有拟合参数输入MCMC样本至§ III.2的模型，并生成中列曲线。右列曲线对应最佳拟合参数，以及参数分布的第0和第100百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Continued)
figures.caption_zh: 图2：续

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Galaxy surface density (left column), galaxy density (middle column), and logarithmic derivatives of galaxy density (right column) similar to Figure 2 , but for subsamples with \(7\leq\) S/N P \(<9\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：星系表面密度（左列）、星系密度（中列）和星系密度对数导数（右列），与图2类似，但针对\(7\leq\) S/N P \(<9\)的子样本。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Galaxy surface density (left column), galaxy density (middle column), and logarithmic derivatives of galaxy density (right column) similar to Figure 2 , but for subsamples with S/N P \(\geq 9\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：星系表面密度（左列）、星系密度（中列）和星系密度对数导数（右列），与图2类似，但针对S/N P \(\geq 9\)的子样本。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Galaxy surface density (left column), galaxy density (middle column), and logarithmic derivatives of galaxy density (right column) similar to Figure 2 , but for \(7\leq\) S/N P \( P \(\geq 9\) with larger redshift binning as described in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：星系表面密度（左列）、星系密度（中列）和星系密度对数导数（右列），与图2类似，但针对\(7\leq\) S/N P \( P \(\geq 9\)且红移分箱更大（如表1所述）的子样本。

title: Dynamic Zoom Simulations of structure formation beyond standard cosmology
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to A&A
summary: (Abridged) A thorough interpretation of the current and upcoming generation of cosmological observations requires unprecedented large-scale, high-resolution simulations spanning multiple cosmological models and parameters. The realization of these computationally demanding simulations poses a crucial technical challenge. We present beyond - $Λ$CDM implementations of the Dynamic Zoom Simulations (DZS) method, a performance-enhancing technique tailored for large-scale simulations that produce lightcone-like outputs. This approach dynamically decreases the resolution of a simulation in the regions that are not in causal connection with the observer, saving computational resources without directly affecting the physical properties within the lightcone. We implemented the DZS algorithm in two state-of-the-art codes supporting non-standard cosmologies, namely modified $f(R)$ gravity in Arepo and dark sector interactions in Gadget4. We analyzed result accuracy and performance gains across resolution, simulation volume and model by comparing runs performed with and without the DZS algorithm. Our DZS reproduce the lightcone halo mass function, sky-projected massmaps, and matter and weak lensing convergence power spectra with an accuracy of $\simeq$ 0.1% or higher in most cases. In terms of performance, DZS runs in our test simulations can save up to $\sim$ 50% runtime compared to the non-DZS counterparts. A scaling to larger simulated volumes suggests that performance gains could improve by an additional $\sim$ 20% at the resolution levels of current state-of-the-art simulations. The validation of the DZS algorithm in non-standard models demonstrates that this technique can enable cost effective, large-scale ($\gtrsim$ 1 cGpc/h) simulations with state-of-the-art resolution, providing the computational framework needed to constrain and help the interpretation of forthcoming data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了超越ΛCDM模型的动态缩放模拟（DZS）方法，通过动态降低与观测者无因果连接区域的分辨率来节省计算资源，在保持光锥内物理属性准确性的同时，实现了高达50%的运行时间节省。
AI.motivation: 当前和下一代宇宙学观测需要大规模、高分辨率的模拟来支持多种宇宙学模型和参数，但这些计算密集型模拟面临巨大的技术挑战。需要开发能够有效节省计算资源而不影响物理准确性的模拟方法。
AI.method: 开发了超越ΛCDM模型的动态缩放模拟（DZS）方法，该方法动态降低与观测者无因果连接区域的分辨率。在支持非标准宇宙学的两个先进代码中实现了DZS算法：Arepo中的修正f(R)引力和Gadget4中的暗物质相互作用模型。
AI.result: DZS方法在大多数情况下能够以0.1%或更高的精度重现光锥晕质量函数、天空投影质量图、物质和弱引力透镜收敛功率谱。在性能方面，测试模拟中DZS运行相比非DZS运行可节省高达50%的运行时间。扩展到更大模拟体积时，性能增益还可额外提高约20%。
AI.conclusion: DZS算法在非标准模型中的验证表明，该技术能够实现成本效益高的大规模（≥1 cGpc/h）模拟，并保持最先进的分辨率，为约束和解释即将到来的观测数据提供了必要的计算框架。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要关注非标准宇宙学模型下的动态缩放模拟方法，属于计算宇宙学技术。虽然涉及弱引力透镜功率谱，但并非用户核心的强引力透镜研究，且不涉及高红移星系动力学、多相气体等用户优先主题。无核心作者匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为宇宙学模拟方法，与用户强引力透镜、高红移星系等核心主题关联弱。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。DZS方法为模拟技术，非用户关注的透镜建模或星系观测方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。方法本身有创新性，但与用户研究领域关联弱。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于纯宇宙学模拟方法，偏离用户主要兴趣领域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: (节略) 对当前及未来一代宇宙学观测的深入解读，需要跨越多种宇宙学模型和参数，进行前所未有的大尺度、高分辨率模拟。实现这些计算量巨大的模拟是一个关键的技术挑战。我们提出了超越ΛCDM模型的动态变焦模拟（DZS）方法实现，这是一种专为产生类光锥输出的大尺度模拟量身定制的性能增强技术。该方法动态降低与观测者无因果联系区域内的模拟分辨率，从而节省计算资源，且不会直接影响光锥内的物理性质。我们在两个支持非标准宇宙学的先进代码中实现了DZS算法，即Arepo中的修正f(R)引力和Gadget4中的暗区相互作用。我们通过比较使用和不使用DZS算法运行的模拟，分析了结果精度以及在不同分辨率、模拟体积和模型下的性能提升。在大多数情况下，我们的DZS模拟重现了光锥晕质量函数、天球投影质量图以及物质和弱引力透镜会聚功率谱，精度约为0.1%或更高。在性能方面，在我们的测试模拟中，DZS运行相比非DZS运行最多可节省约50%的运行时间。扩展到更大的模拟体积表明，在当前最先进模拟的分辨率水平下，性能提升可能再提高约20%。DZS算法在非标准模型中的验证表明，该技术能够以最先进的分辨率实现成本效益高的大尺度（≥ 1 cGpc/h）模拟，为约束和帮助解读即将到来的数据提供了必要的计算框架。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：DZS算法在非标准模型中的验证表明，该技术能够实现成本效益高的大尺度（≥ 1 cGpc/h）模拟，并保持最先进的分辨率，为约束和解释即将到来的观测数据提供了必要的计算框架。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: 1D+1D space-time diagram illustrating the lightcone-like approach of DZS. An example simulation (a cubic box \(8192\) comoving Mpc/h on a side) is depicted from its initial conditions (top) to redshift, or lookback time, zero (bottom). The depicted density field is only included for displaying purposes, and does not match the size of the volume marked on the \(x\) axis (it is rendered from TNG300-3-Dark simulation data, Nelson et al., 2019 ) . The observer is placed at redshift zero at the location marked with \(O\) . The simulation volume is crossed by the lightcone (blue curve) at a time indicated by the dashed black line. Traditional snapshots, or time slices, are taken at the cosmic times highlighted by horizontal colored lines, leading to fixed-time density maps of real simulation volumes, rendered from the TNG300-3-Dark (left) and the medium DZS on the right (see Table 1 in Section 3 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：说明DZS类光锥方法的1D+1D时空图。一个示例模拟（边长为\(8192\) comoving Mpc/h的立方体）从其初始条件（顶部）描绘到红移或回溯时间零点（底部）。所描绘的密度场仅用于显示目的，与\(x\)轴上标记的体积大小不匹配（它来自TNG300-3-Dark模拟数据，Nelson等人，2019）。观测者位于红移零点，标记为\(O\)的位置。模拟体积被光锥（蓝色曲线）在虚线黑线指示的时间穿过。传统的快照或时间切片，在水平彩色线条突出显示的宇宙时间拍摄，产生真实模拟体积的固定时间密度图，左侧来自TNG300-3-Dark，右侧来自中等DZS（见表1第3节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Equation of state (EoS) parameter of dark energy \(w_{DE}\) as a function of redshift \(z\) . The blue curve is the best-fit CPL parametrization from Abdul Karim et al. ( 2025 ) , with \(w_{0}=-0.667\) , \(w_{a}=-1.09\) . Its “phantom” behavior ( \(w_{DE} Lodha et al. ( 2025 , their eq. 15) , and reproducing the low- \(z\) trend of the CPL best-fit without the phantom behavior.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：暗能量状态方程（EoS）参数\(w_{DE}\)作为红移\(z\)的函数。蓝色曲线是来自Abdul Karim等人（2025）的最佳拟合CPL参数化，其中\(w_{0}=-0.667\)，\(w_{a}=-1.09\)。其“幻影”行为（\(w_{DE}<-1\)）在低红移时与数据一致，但在高红移时与数据不一致。红色曲线是来自Lodha等人（2025，他们的方程15）的“非幻影”参数化，再现了CPL最佳拟合的低\(z\)趋势，但没有幻影行为。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Simulation parameters used for algorithm validation, including the side length of the simulated volume, the number of simulation particles, the resulting mass resolution, and the redshift range in which lightcone output was produced. The latter is chosen to ensure that \(R_{lc}(z)<L_{box}/2\) always, avoiding any box replications. Note that, at the highest considered redshifts, the DZS algorithm has already significantly modified the simulation volume.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于算法验证的模拟参数，包括模拟体积的边长、模拟粒子数、由此产生的质量分辨率以及产生光锥输出的红移范围。选择后者是为了确保始终满足\(R_{lc}(z)<L_{box}/2\)，避免任何盒子复制。请注意，在考虑的最高红移处，DZS算法已经显著修改了模拟体积。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Models and parameters adopted in the DZS algorithm validation.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：DZS算法验证中采用的模型和参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Lightcone halo mass function of the \(\Lambda\) CDM mediumHR twin simulations (top). The std solid histogram and the dzs dashed histogram are in excellent agreement. This is also shown by the relative difference plot between the two curves (bottom), where we arbitrarily set the \(y\) axis scale.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：\(\Lambda\)CDM mediumHR双胞胎模拟的光锥晕质量函数（顶部）。std实线直方图和dzs虚线直方图非常一致。两条曲线之间的相对差异图（底部）也显示了这一点，其中我们任意设置了\(y\)轴刻度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left column: Lightcone halo mass function of the MG-Arepo mediumHR twin simulations, for the MG-F5 and MG-F6 models (top panel). Solid lines refer to std runs, dashed lines to dzs ones. The \(\Lambda\) CDM std case is overlaid as a dotted line for reference. Relative difference plots are included for both MG models (middle and bottom panels), with a dashed line at \(N_{LC}^{dzs}/N_{LC}^{std}-1=0\) for reference. Right column: the same as in the left column, but for the DS-DESI and DS-THAW mediumHR simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左列：MG-Arepo mediumHR双胞胎模拟的光锥晕质量函数，针对MG-F5和MG-F6模型（顶部面板）。实线指std运行，虚线指dzs运行。\(\Lambda\)CDM std情况作为参考用虚线叠加。两个MG模型都包含了相对差异图（中间和底部面板），其中虚线位于\(N_{LC}^{dzs}/N_{LC}^{std}-1=0\)作为参考。右列：与左列相同，但针对DS-DESI和DS-THAW mediumHR模拟。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Maps showing the angular matter density \(\Sigma\) of the mediumHR twin simulations in the \(\Lambda\) CDM (left column), the MG-F5 (middle column) and the DS-DESI (right column) cases. For each of the three models, maps for the dzs and std simulations are depicted in the top and middle panel, respectively. At the bottom, the relative differences between the dzs and std cases are shown, with the MG-F5 case employing the color green for differences above \(1\%\) in absolute value.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：显示\(\Lambda\)CDM（左列）、MG-F5（中列）和DS-DESI（右列）情况下mediumHR双胞胎模拟的角物质密度\(\Sigma\)的图。对于这三个模型中的每一个，dzs和std模拟的图分别描绘在顶部和中间面板。在底部，显示了dzs和std情况之间的相对差异，其中MG-F5情况对绝对值超过\(1\%\)的差异使用绿色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Top panel: Angular power spectrum \(\mathcal{C}(l)\) of \(\Lambda\) CDM mediumHR , medium and largeHR runs. The power is lower in the latter pair of simulations due to the larger output redshift range (see Table 1 ). Solid lines refer to std runs, dashed lines to dzs ones. Bottom panels: Relative differences between the dzs and std simulations for the different run types discussed above, as indicated in each panel. The dashed line is located at \(\Delta\mathcal{C}(l)=0\) as a reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：顶部面板：\(\Lambda\)CDM mediumHR、medium和largeHR运行的角功率谱\(\mathcal{C}(l)\)。由于输出红移范围更大（见表1），后一对模拟的功率较低。实线指std运行，虚线指dzs运行。底部面板：如上所述，不同运行类型的dzs和std模拟之间的相对差异，如每个面板所示。虚线位于\(\Delta\mathcal{C}(l)=0\)作为参考。
